title: Sales Manager Vacancy at K Raheja Corp - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at K Raheja Corp - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
K Raheja Corp has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About K Raheja Corp:
K Raheja Corp is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with K Raheja Corp!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
